focus_points.label: Post-launch visibility and momentum this week.
focus_points.reason: Notes say Priya shipped a major feature Monday and the team noticed, but she’s been quieter this week. One possibility is normal post-launch recovery; another is something unresolved worth clarifying whether she’s still engaged or waiting on something.

focus_points.label: Mentoring thread — what stalled and why.
focus_points.reason: Priya mentioned wanting to mentor a few months ago and that thread never moved. Could be a priority shift, unclear ownership, or missing follow-through—worth getting her current expectations and what she wants you to do next.

focus_points.label: What she expects to own next quarter.
focus_points.reason: Whether she’s forming plans that the billing rewrite will disrupt is exactly the kind of bi-weekly alignment issue where you want a clear read on what she’s saying yes to next quarter and what she’s explicitly not taking on.

focus_points.label: How she wants to mentor and delegate next.
focus_points.reason: As a Senior Backend Engineer, the next step often shows up as leverage—coaching and delegating real ownership rather than holding the work. A bi-weekly check helps you confirm she’s set up to mentor and still deliver through the billing rewrite.
